# Methods or middle chapter

This template ships three chapter placeholders. Rename, add, or remove
chapters as your book needs. Edit `_quarto.yml` to match — Quarto reads
the `chapters:` list from there and uses it to build the sidebar and
search index.

Persistent-identifier citations carry across chapters cleanly. A PubMed
ID: @pmid:31477126. An arXiv preprint: @arxiv:2104.10729. Both resolve
on next render through the `quartobot resolve` pre-render hook, which
writes the CSL JSON entries to `references.json` before pandoc starts.
